identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: Rounded corners on everything (We are building a serious tool)

project.name: Universal Privacy Layer (UPL)
project.aesthetic: Cyber-Noir / High-Fidelity Crypto / Dark Mode Only

heading.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Big numbers

mono.usage: Wallet addresses, Transaction hashes, Code snippets, Data values

forbidden: Solid Grey Backgrounds (Always tint or use black)

spacing.philosophy: Generous padding inside containers, tight gaps between data points.

rules: Asymmetry: Use col-span-2 or row-span-2 to break the grid.
Full Height: Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch.

buttons.style: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). 1px Border. Hover Glow.
buttons.classes: rounded-sm border border-[#00FF94]/50 bg-[#00FF94]/10 text-[#00FF94] hover:bg-[#00FF94] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold

cards.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-[#00FF94]/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: Terminal style. Underline or Box with blinking cursor.
inputs.classes: bg-black/50 border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#00FF94] rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-lg font-mono placeholder:text-white/20

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' and 'bg-black/60' for headers and floating navs.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px delicate inner stroke is MANDATORY. Use 'border-white/10'.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay to the body background if possible.

hero_background.description: Dark futuristic city skyline for Landing Page Hero

dashboard_bg.description: Abstract Blockchain Cubes for Dashboard Background (Low Opacity)

feature_stealth.description: Green textured abstract for Stealth Mode feature

feature_privacy.description: Woman with phone in dark for Private Send/Receive

feature_network.description: Abstract Network Nodes for Chain Selection

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts links to the index.html or import them in CSS immediately.
2. OVERRIDE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors defined in 'colors.palette'.
3. CUSTOMIZE SHADCN: Go into /components/ui and STRIP the 'rounded-md' classes. Replace with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm'. Add borders.
4. DARK MODE: Ensure 'dark' class is always applied to the html/body tag. This app is DARK MODE ONLY.
5. USE LUCIDE ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Keep them thin (stroke-width={1.5}).
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' (generic centered layouts, smooth gradients).
Create depth through z-index and black-on-black layers.
NO centered app container. Use full width.
Export components as named exports, pages as default exports.
